div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Java/Ruby/C#/Python team? → Selenium or Playwright
Multi-tab / OAuth popup? → Playwright or Selenium
Mobile-web real device? → Selenium + Appium
Long-lived enterprise suite (10+ yrs)? → Selenium
Greenfield JS/TS E2E (2023+)? → Playwright (default)
Turnkey dashboard/reporting? → Cypress Cloud or BrowserStack
Free parallel in CI? → Playwright

display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Trace: trace.zip (action-by-action time travel, built-in).
Multi-tab: yes. Cross-origin: yes. Parallel: free, default.

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Iframe: Cypress test JS + App JS
same tab · same origin · cy.intercept via XHR hook

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Trace: Cypress App time-travel replay.
Multi-tab: limited. Cross-origin: cy.origin (v12+).
Parallel: Cypress Cloud (paid).

span.p:
Out-of-process. W3C standard. Protocol-stable.
No built-in trace. Parallel: Grid or cloud.
